nasb.text: Then the king said, “Give the first woman the living child, and by no means kill him. She is his mother.”

esv.text: Then the king answered and said, “Give the living child to the first woman, and by no means put him to death; she is his mother.”

cnv.text: 王回答說：“把活孩子給這個婦人，千萬不可殺死他，這個婦人實在是他的母親。”

ccb.text: 王说：“不可杀这孩子，把他交给刚才为孩子求情的女人吧！她是孩子的母亲。”
